description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js CI Windows Platform that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should test Node.js on multiple Windows platforms, Node.js versions, and architectures. Use a matrix strategy to run the job on windows-2019 and windows-2022 with Node.js versions 14.x, 16.x, 18.x, 19.x and architectures x64, x86. For each job, check out the repository, set up the specified Node.js version and architecture, verify the Node.js installation, install dependencies with npm install, and run npm tests.
